toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Friday, July 3' group Daily Performance Summary (delivered Jul 4 6:26 AM PT), parsed from HTML at Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM run.
toast.note: Fri Jul 3 GROUP-level summary parsed at Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM run (delivered 6:26 AM PT). Net $10,051.43 (+34.9% vs SDLW $7,451.90; +22.6% vs 4-wk Fri avg $8,200.59) / Gross $10,306.30 (+33.0% vs SDLW $7,747.90; +21.8% vs 4-wk avg $8,460.75) / 384 guests (SDLW 272, +41.2%) / 206 orders (SDLW 163, +26.4%) / Labor 14.0% of net = $1,407.20 (derived from %) / Discounts 2.5% of gross = $257.66 (derived) / 17 void items (void $ not in group email) / Refunds $0 / Gift cards $0. Big July-4th-weekend Friday. 1 remaining open order at closeout. Location-level Jul 3 email (with exact labor/discount $ and void $) not yet delivered at this run (~7:40 AM PT typical).

googleAds.reportsNote: Sat Jul 4 4 AM run: 2 Google Ads report-ready emails in last 24h (Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report; Campaign performance). No disapproval or budget-alert emails. Figures below carried from Fri Jul 3 live scrape.

disapprovals.detail: Previously Disapproved (Destination not working HTTP 404 iOS + Copyrighted content, Jun 9). As of the Sat Jun 27 live scrape this campaign is fully 'Eligible' (no longer Limited) and served Jun 26 (913 impr, 38 clicks, $26.72). Appears fully recovered; confirm destination URL fix held.

billingPeriod.label: Jul 1 - Jul 3, 2026
billingPeriod.note: Billing period Jul 1-Jul 3, 2026: ad spend $47.24, Avg CPC $1.07, Avg CPL $4.29. LIVE from Yelp Ads dashboard Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM.

yelpAds.note: Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM LIVE Chrome scrape. Last 30d: 34.6k ad impr (77% of 44.9k), 433 ad clicks, 534 ad page visits (57% of 930), 128 ad leads (68% of 187). Billing period Jul 1-Jul 3 = $47.24 spend / $1.07 CPC / $4.29 CPL (spend +$21.54 vs Jul 1-2). 12mo: Ads 1,035 leads (61%) / Organic 667 (39%) / Total 1,702; forecast 172; 12mo ad page visits 8.2k. Leads breakdown: Directions/Map 738, Calls 112, Website 828, CTA 24. Bonus budget remaining not shown on dashboard. Yelp inbox badge shows 15.
